The instance we want to generate will be for the following class:
class CandidateProfile(StructuredContent):
    """Structured profile of a job candidate"""
    name: str  # Full name
    skills: List[Any] | None = None  # Key skills
    experience_years: int | None = None  # Years of experience
    summary: str  # Brief profile summary

DO NOT create information.
If some information is not present for an attribute, output the default value or None according to the attribute definition.

</profile>

- RoZKPYTWuuSuIzTAdqBs: fquiLRTBnwxempGsTlin
  OglCnQzCwwrELiksjzVH
- jshzcSeUUZplbPAtGiJq: eTzzIPTyAmgxrvGiOOdl
  zkbjKKiIRLVaCBQnLvxN
</search_result>

---
The instance we want to generate will be for the following class:
class MatchScore(StructuredContent):
    """Score for how well a candidate matches a role"""
    score: float  # Match score 0-100
    strengths: List[Any] | None = None  # Key strengths
    gaps: List[Any] | None = None  # Skill gaps
    recommendation: str  # Hiring recommendation

DO NOT create information.
If some information is not present for an attribute, output the default value or None according to the attribute definition.
